blocks.headline: How can we help?
blocks.sub: Search our guides, walkthroughs, and answers — or browse the latest articles below. Everything you need to get the most out of Helpdesk, written by the people who build it.

items.d: New to Helpdesk? Set up your account, invite your team, and connect your first inbox in under ten minutes with our step-by-step onboarding guides.
Go deeper on workflows, automations, integrations, and reporting. Practical, task-focused walkthroughs for getting real work done.
Quick answers to the questions we hear most — billing, permissions, data exports, and troubleshooting the issues that come up day to day.

blocks.html:

(function(){var list=document.getElementById('kb-list');if(!list)return;function esc(s){return String(s==null?'':s).replace(/[&<>"]/g,function(c){return{'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"'}[c];});}function card(a){return '
'+esc(a.category||'Article')+'

'+esc(a.title||'Untitled')+'

'+esc((a.body||'').slice(0,160))+((a.body||'').length>160?'…':'')+'

';}var samples=[{category:'Getting Started',title:'Setting up your first inbox',body:'Connect an email address or shared mailbox so your team can start replying to customers from one place. Takes about five minutes.'},{category:'Guides',title:'Automate replies with rules',body:'Use rules to tag, route, and auto-respond to common requests so your team spends time on the conversations that matter.'},{category:'FAQ',title:'How do I export my data?',body:'You can export conversations and contacts as CSV at any time from Settings → Data. Exports include every field on the record.'}];function render(items){if(!items||!items.length){list.innerHTML='

No articles published yet — here are a few examples of what they look like.

'+samples.map(card).join('');return;}list.innerHTML=items.map(card).join('');}fetch('/api/data/articles').then(function(r){if(!r.ok)throw new Error('bad status');return r.json();}).then(function(d){var items=Array.isArray(d)?d:(d&&d.records)?d.records:(d&&d.data)?d.data:[];render(items);}).catch(function(){render([]);});})();
